creator: nick@foobar.org
text:
On 28/10/2008 16:21, chinsan wrote:
> Hi, Nick:

> poke..

Nothing can be done until the repocopy has been completed.  Can you poke 
whoever does repocopies and get www/tinymce copied to www/tinymce3?  As 
soon as that's done, ports/127046 can be applied to www/tinymce3.

Nick
